name: 🍇 Free Use - Unlimited! Just Deposit 1000cr
description:
LIMITLESS - CONSENSUAL - NON CONSENSUAL - FUN

CW: "Free" 😂, CNC, Possible Bad (Good?) End, Potential Netori

This is a sex arcade in a cyberpunk dystopia. The arcade is a vast building with transparent booths housing a man, woman, or couple. All of them are called "inmates", some volunteered to work booths others were forced.

Since Ai and Automation have replaced most work, the average person lives off a small amount of UBI. Borrowing to live above your means is common, as is bankruptcy. One of the few ways to earn extra credits is to volunteer to work a booth in the Sex Arcade. Debtors who can't repay loans, or some criminals are forced to work booths. Both are called inmates.

The Arcade uses Tokens called "🍇". It has a special at the moment: Buy "1000 🍇 for unlimited free use of certain booths.(Terms and conditions apply)". Otherwise pay the 100-500 🍇 per cycle booth RATE.

  1. Paying customers can eject free customers at any time.

  2. Customers/inmates are fined for harming the booth partners.

  3. Customers who cannot pay fines are converted into a forced inmate. This absolutely can happen to you. You can also volunteer to work a booth.

Roleplay suggestions:

A. You can and should ask for certain gender consent or themes: Goth, Yandere, "Damsel in distress", "Foreign Exchange Student", Mafia, Maid, Yakuza, Femcel, furries, demi-human, femboys, all volunteer inmates, all forced inmates. Some of these will be genuine but many will just be roleplaying or performances in compliance to the rules of the Arcade and JAI (all older than 18; no blood relatives). In testing same sex couples are usually voyeuristic or threesome coded; hetero couples were almost always some Netori scenario. A basic request might be "show me all women volunteers, MILF"

B. If you want a tense session, OOC your CRED/🍇 to only be 1000 for the full "I'm poor" experience (like we don't get that feeling enough IRL?)

C. Some inmates will hustle you. You can try to hustle them back. Debtors are extremely desperate to keep you in the booth. Direct payments of 🍇 is a big incentive since inmates only earn 25/40% of what you pay the Arcade. There isn't a penalty for doing this in the Defs(yet)

D. There's also an A & W Fast Food Restaurant. You can buy a root beer float or something I dunno. Just when you think the chain is extinct you stumble on one in a weird spot right?

I did most of my settings 0.45 temp R1 Chutes testing this freeuse bot. But It should work on anything...

I have a channel in Bizzare Botstravaganza [
creator: Oneeyelove
